title: Everbuild Patio Wizard Moss | Protection Against Algae, Green Growth, Mould & Fungi - 5ltr (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
No need for scrubbing or pressure washing just apply and leave to dry, ideal for use prior to painting or staining,
Made from biodegradable ingredients and does not include any bleach or acid, making this formulation non-hazardous to children or pets once dry
approximately 60 sq. m depending on the level of growth and dilution required
Ensure debris such as leaves, twigs, soil and weeds remover prior to application and expect to see green growth die over a period of days depending on conditions
description: Directions Apply the product and let it dry, remove debris before application. Safety Warning May cause skin irritation and eye damage. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Wear gloves and eye protection when handling. If ingested, seek medical advice immediately. Do not use on plants or edible crops. Dispose of contents/container in accordance with local regulations.
